brief_summary: Two stacked timelines comparing historical GMK round-2 cadence (warm-grey, 3-5 year gap between R1 and R2, 'generation gap') with the compressed GMK CYL line cadence (coral-emphasized, ~18 months between R1 and R2 — 'GREG fits inside it'). Caption frames the watch-point: if GREG R2 clears at R1 numbers, the cadence is reproducible.
data_sources: gmk-cyl-greg-2-group-buy.mdx § 'The round-2 pattern, now a pattern' — 'Where the broader GMK community has historically waited years between rounds — sometimes long enough that R2 buyers are a different generation of the hobby than R1 — the CYL sub-line is running closer to an eighteen-month rhythm. GREG R2 fits inside that envelope.'
